channel.title: patanjali on Patanjali SLPSK

item.title: Patanjali SLPSK
item.description: I am currently on the academic job market. Please feel free to reach out, if you feel that I would be an appropriate fit for your research group or if you need any additional information. Hi, I am a postdoctoral researcher at University of Florida where I work with Dr. Swarup Bhunia. I am affliated with the Warren B Nelms Institute at the Electrical Engineering Department. I did my Ph.D at IIT Madras, where I was advised by Dr.
